title: Run boundary stabilization cleanup loop
summary: Performs the first required validation, neighboring-surface expansion, fixes, docs updates, and commit pass after the main implementation slices land.
scope_items: Run the first post-implementation validation pass across runtime, docs, workflows, and validators.
Fix adjacent issues uncovered during the first stabilization review and update companion docs and workflow modules.
done_when_items: The first cleanup loop lands at least one bounded commit with real fixes.
Neighboring surfaces touched by the architecture refactor are revalidated.
